import pandas as pd

# Sample DataFrame creation
data = {
    'Patient ID': [1, 2],
    'age': [30, 45],
    'sex': ['M', 'F'],
    'procedure type': ['A', 'B'],
    'hour_1': [1, 2],
    'hour_2': [3, 4],
    'hour_3': [5, 6],
    'hour_4': [7, 8],
    'hour_5': [9, 10],
    'hour_6': [11, 12],
    'hour_7': [13, 14],
    'hour_8': [15, 16],
    'hour_9': [17, 18],
    'hour_10': [19, 20]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Reshaping the DataFrame
melted_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Patient ID', 'age', 'sex', 'procedure type'], 
                     value_vars=[f'hour_{i}' for i in range(1, 11)], 
                     var_name='Time since surgery', 
                     value_name='value')

# Extracting hour number from the 'Time since surgery' column
melted_df['Time since surgery'] = melted_df['Time since surgery'].str.replace('hour_', '').astype(int)

# Dropping the original 'hour' columns and renaming 'value' column
final_df = melted_df[['Patient ID', 'age', 'sex', 'procedure type', 'Time since surgery', 'value']]

# Display the final DataFrame
print(final_df)

import pandas as pd

# Sample DataFrame creation
data = {
    'Patient ID': [1, 2],
    'age': [30, 45],
    'sex': ['M', 'F'],
    'procedure type': ['A', 'B'],
    1: [2, 3],
    2: [1, 2],
    3: [0, 1],

    10: [1, 0]
}

df = pd.DataFrame(data)

# Reshaping the DataFrame
melted_df = df.melt(id_vars=['Patient ID', 'age', 'sex', 'procedure type'], 
                     value_vars=list(range(1, 11)), 
                     var_name='Hour', 
                     value_name='Value')

# Filtering out rows where Value is 0
melted_df = melted_df[melted_df['Value'] > 0]

# Creating the final DataFrame
final_df = melted_df[['Patient ID', 'age', 'sex', 'procedure type', 'Hour', 'Value']]
final_df['Time since surgery'] = final_df['Hour']
final_df = final_df.drop(columns=['Hour'])

# Reorganizing the DataFrame
final_df = final_df[['Patient ID', 'Time since surgery', 'age', 'sex', 'procedure type', 'Value']]

# Resetting index
final_df.reset_index(drop=True, inplace=True)

print(final_df)
